meaning: Heights戈兰高地[叙利亚西南部](1967年被以色列占领)
examples: In the Golan Heights, an estimated 80, 000 Syrians fled.
On the Golan border, several Palestinians were shot dead.
"The Golan will not be handed over to Syria," Landau said.
The issue of U.S. forces on the Golan Heights involves large stakes for the United States.
Syria has insisted Annapolis address its demands for the return of the Israeli-held Golan Heights.
